annotator_1.text: LabelPigeon outperforms baselines in label projection
annotator_1.source_quote: We design a direct evaluation scheme for label projection, and find that LabelPigeon outperforms baselines

annotator_1.text: LabelPigeon actively improves translation quality in 11 languages
annotator_1.source_quote: find that LabelPigeon outperforms baselines and actively improves translation quality in 11 languages

annotator_1.text: LabelPigeon shows consistent improvement in translation quality across 203 languages
annotator_1.source_quote: We further assess translation quality across 203 languages and varying annotation complexity, finding consistent improvement

annotator_1.text: The improvement in translation quality is attributed to additional fine-tuning
annotator_1.source_quote: finding consistent improvement attributed to additional fine-tuning

annotator_1.text: LabelPigeon reports substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer over comparable work across 27 languages and three downstream tasks
annotator_1.source_quote: Finally, across 27 languages and three downstream tasks, we report substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer over comparable work

annotator_1.text: LabelPigeon achieves up to +39.9 F1 on NER
annotator_1.source_quote: we report substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer over comparable work, up to +39.9 F1 on NER

annotator_1.text: XML-tagged label projection provides effective and efficient label transfer without compromising translation quality
annotator_1.source_quote: Overall, our results demonstrate that XML-tagged label projection provides effective and efficient label transfer without compromising translation quality

annotator_2.text: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer.
annotator_2.source_quote: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer, extending span-annotated datasets from a high-resource language to low-resource ones.

annotator_2.text: Label projection extends span-annotated datasets from a high-resource language to low-resource ones.
annotator_2.source_quote: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer, extending span-annotated datasets from a high-resource language to low-resource ones.

annotator_2.text: Most approaches perform label projection as a separate step after machine translation.
annotator_2.source_quote: Most approaches perform label projection as a separate step after machine translation

annotator_2.text: Prior work that combines translation and label projection reports degraded translation quality.
annotator_2.source_quote: prior work that combines the two reports degraded translation quality

annotator_2.text: LabelPigeon is a novel framework that jointly performs translation and label projection via XML tags.
annotator_2.source_quote: We re-evaluate this claim with LabelPigeon, a novel framework that jointly performs translation and label projection via XML tags.
